channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Sunday, May 17, 2026
item.description: Two threads dominate today that sit directly at the intersection of your work and your world: the Taiwan-chip risk story is not just geopolitics — if Xi moves on Taiwan in the next five years, the AI infrastructure your consulting practice depends on gets choked at the source, an...
